## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest change that solves it.

Closes #

## Validation

List the commands or scenarios used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change stays within the scope documented in `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] Tests cover non-trivial behavior and all offline checks pass.
- [ ] User-visible behavior is reflected in `README.md` and `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] Protocol changes include updated references, hashes, and evaluation cases.
- [ ] Storage changes preserve encryption, validation, correction, export, and deletion behavior.
- [ ] Logs, fixtures, screenshots, and issue links contain no real conversations, secrets, or personal
      data.
- [ ] Commits include a Developer Certificate of Origin sign-off.
